• Are you legally authorized to work in the United States for any employer? *
  • Will you now or in the future require The Trevor Project to commence ("sponsor") an immigration case in order to employ you (for example, H-1B or other employment-based immigration case)? This is sometimes called "sponsorship" for an employment-based visa status. *
  • Do you understand that applicants must be authorized to work for ANY employer in the U.S., and that we are unable to sponsor or take over sponsorship of an employment Visa at this time? *
  • Given the salary posted for this position, what are your salary expectations? (Please indicate a dollar amount) *
